name: medical clinic billing managers processing 20–50 invoices/month tool
description: For medical clinic billing managers processing 20–50 invoices/month, inefficient conversion causes cash flow gaps. We automate the submission process instead of manual entry of billing submissions.

problem_solved: Inefficient conversion of patient visit logs into insurance billing submissions.
